requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (LVD 2014/35/EU + EN 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（低压指令2014/35/EU + EN 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（低壓指令2014/35/EU + EN 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-cream appliances) placed on the EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU. The specific harmonised standard is EN 60335-2-24:2010 + A11:2012 + A1:2019 + A2:2019 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read in conjunction with the general standard EN 60335-1:2012 + amendments. Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings. Self-declaration by the manufacturer (Module A conformity assessment) is the standard route; CE marking is affixed before market placement.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、冰淇淋器具）须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。适用的产品专项协调标准为EN 60335-2-24:2010 + A11:2012 + A1:2019 + A2:2019（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准EN 60335-1:2012及其修订版结合使用。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。制造商自我声明（A模块合格评定）为标准路径；CE标志须在投放市场前加贴。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、冰淇淋器具）須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU。適用的產品專項協調標準為EN 60335-2-24:2010 + A11:2012 + A1:2019 + A2:2019（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準EN 60335-1:2012及其修訂版結合使用。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。製造商自我聲明（A模組合格評定）為標準路徑；CE標誌須在投放市場前加貼。

standards_or_laws: EN 60335-2-24:2010 + A11:2012 + A1:2019 + A2:2019 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (harmonised under LVD)
EN 60335-1:2012 + A11:2014 + A13:2017 + A1:2019 + A14:2019 + A2:2019 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence under the EU LVD CE marking conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain fresh EN 60335-2-24 (and EN 60335-1) testing from an EU-recognised laboratory or an ILAC MRA-member laboratory whose scope covers the relevant IEC standard. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD (Module A self-declaration with Technical File is the standard route); however, some CB-Scheme test reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) may be partially re-used if issued by an IECEE NCB and covering all EU-specific deviations — manufacturers should verify this with a qualified EU compliance consultant. Key documentation gaps: EU Declaration of Conformity (citing LVD 2014/35/EU and EN 60335-2-24); CE marking on appliance; Technical Construction File; and instructions in the language(s) of the destination EU member state(s). National deviations in GB 4706.13 (e.g., different socket outlet types, earthing arrangements, or test conditions) mean that Chinese CCC test data cannot be assumed to cover EN 60335-2-24 test requirements without engineering review.
gap.zh: 出口商须重新通过欧盟认可实验室（或在相关IEC标准覆盖范围内被接受的ILAC MRA成员实验室）完成EN 60335-2-24（及EN 60335-1）检测。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构（A模块自我声明+技术文件为标准路径）；但如IECEE NCB出具的CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）涵盖所有EU特定偏差，则可能部分复用——制造商应与合格的EU合规顾问核实。关键文件差距：EU符合性声明（引用LVD 2014/35/EU及EN 60335-2-24）；器具上的CE标志；技术构造文件；以及目的地EU成员国语言的使用说明书。GB 4706.13中的国家偏差（如不同的插座类型、接地方式或试验条件）意味着中国CCC检测数据不能在未经工程评审的情况下默认涵盖EN 60335-2-24的试验要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須重新通過歐盟認可實驗室（或在相關IEC標準覆蓋範圍內被接受的ILAC MRA成員實驗室）完成EN 60335-2-24（及EN 60335-1）檢測。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構（A模組自我聲明+技術文件為標準路徑）；但如IECEE NCB出具的CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）涵蓋所有EU特定偏差，則可能部分複用——製造商應與合格的EU合規顧問核實。關鍵文件差距：EU符合性聲明（引用LVD 2014/35/EU及EN 60335-2-24）；器具上的CE標誌；技術構造文件；以及目的地EU成員國語言的使用說明書。GB 4706.13中的國家偏差（如不同的插座類型、接地方式或試驗條件）意味著中國CCC檢測數據不能在未經工程評審的情況下默認涵蓋EN 60335-2-24的試驗要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before EU market placement under Directive 2014/35/EU; EN 60335-2-24 is the harmonised standard providing presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances. EN 60335-2-24 (with EN 60335-1) is the harmonised product-specific safety standard. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway; re-testing to EN 60335-2-24 at an EU-recognised or ILAC MRA laboratory is required. IECEE CB Scheme reports may partially reduce re-testing scope — verify with a qualified EU compliance consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】依据LVD 2014/35/EU，家用制冷器具须强制取得CE标志。EN 60335-2-24（配合EN 60335-1）为适用的协调产品专项安全标准。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足欧盟LVD合格评定路径；须在欧盟认可或ILAC MRA实验室重新按EN 60335-2-24完成检测。IECEE CB体系报告或可部分缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的EU合规顾问核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】依據LVD 2014/35/EU，家用製冷器具須強制取得CE標誌。EN 60335-2-24（配合EN 60335-1）為適用的協調產品專項安全標準。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足歐盟LVD合格評定路徑；須在歐盟認可或ILAC MRA實驗室重新按EN 60335-2-24完成檢測。IECEE CB體系報告或可部分縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的EU合規顧問核實。
